items.title: Draymond Green Says Jayson Tatum Should Be 'Livid' Over Jaylen Brown 76ers Trade
items.body_excerpt: Draymond on Jaylen Brown getting traded to the 76ers "No disrespect to Paul George, but this isn't an even swap, if I'm Jayson Tatum, I'm livid because regardless of what anyone says, we all know the player that Jaylen Brown is and you gonna send this dude to the same division…
